leadText: The X Sp. Def (Japanese: スペシャルガード Special Guard) is a type of battle item introduced in Generation IV. It temporarily boosts a Pokémon's Special Defense stat.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations IV to VI [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Special Defense of a Pokémon currently in battle by 1 level. In Generation VI , it also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Special Defense of a Pokémon currently in battle by 2 levels. It also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item that raises the Sp. Def stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn. X Y OR AS An item that boosts the Sp. Def stat of a Pokémon during a battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item that sharply boosts the Sp. Def stat of a Pokémon during a battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn. S V An item that sharply boosts the Sp. Def stat of a Pokémon in battle. This effect disappears if the Pokémon leaves the battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Masters X Sp. Def: Raises the user's Sp. Def by two stat ranks. X Sp. Def All: Raises the Sp. Def of all allied sync pairs by two stat ranks. X Sp. Def All +: Raises the Sp. Def of all allied sync pairs by three stat ranks.

sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.2.1 Generations IV to VI 1.2.2 Generation VII onward 1.3 Wonder Launcher 1.4 Description 1.5 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS P E BD SP $ 350 $ 175 S M US UM Sw Sh $ 2,000 $ 1,000 S V $ 2,000 $ 500 At Join Avenue 's Market, X Sp. Def can be bought in dozens at $ 3150 each, which equates to $ 262.5 per X Sp. Def. Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations IV to VI [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Special Defense of a Pokémon currently in battle by 1 level. In Generation VI , it also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Special Defense of a Pokémon currently in battle by 2 levels. It also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. Wonder Launcher [ edit | edit source ] The X Sp. Def appears as four Wonder Launcher items, increasing the Defense stat by 1, 2, 3 or 6 levels. It costs 3, 5, 7, or 11 points to use respectively. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item that raises the Sp. Def stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn. X Y OR AS An item that boosts the Sp. Def stat of a Pokémon during a battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item that sharply boosts the Sp. Def stat of a Pokémon during a battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn. S V An item that sharply boosts the Sp. Def stat of a Pokémon in battle. This effect disappears if the Pokémon leaves the battle.
